---
name: Architecture concern (Manual Markdown)
about: Track an architectural boundary, layering, or design concern using the classic markdown template flow.
title: "Architecture concern: <short summary>"
labels: "implementation-issue, issue-type: architecture-concern"
---

## Template Content

### Summary

Short statement of the architectural concern.

### Created phase

Phase N

### Source

Checklist step, review, workflow, or developer source.

### Scheduled target

Required for Critical and High issues.

### Priority

Low | Medium | High | Critical

### Notes

Optional clarifying context.

### Rationale and context

Describe the boundary, layering, ownership, or design concern.

### Impact

Explain the risk to architecture integrity, maintainability, determinism, or scope.

### Implementation notes

Add affected files, design constraints, or candidate remediation notes.

### Acceptance / closing criteria

Describe the design correction, clarification, or implementation
change needed for closure.
